title: Times with Friends
description: A mid-sized Vanilla+ pack that focuses on minor expansions and adjustments
body:
## Summary:
This modpack enhances the existing vanilla gameplay experience by enriching the End and Nether with additional biomes, blocks, foodstuffs, and items.  

It also expands decorative options and introduces new passive creatures, adding variety to the world. Players will encounter revamped hostile mobs, especially in the End with the addition of more dangerous creatures.  

The user interface has been improved with quality-of-life adjustments, shaders, and many overall performance enhancements.

## This pack adds:
🟥 **Expansions to the End and Nether with new blocks, biomes, and items using Nullscape and Incendium**  
🟧 **Additional decorations and passive mobs using Clutter and Naturalist**  
🟨 **New hostile mobs with Enderman and Creeper Overhaul**  
🟩 **More food options with Farmer's Delight**  
🟦 **Changes to the HUD and other QOL features**  
🟪 **Perfomrance optimizations**  
🟫 **Built-in shaders**  
⬛ **A truly Vanilla+ experience**   

---  

#### Complimentary Disclaimer:
Any dysfunction of the shader is a result of the modpack, not the shader itself.
